classes.reasoning: The document explicitly identifies itself as 'INVESTIGATOR BROCHURE' in the header and follows the standard IB structure with sections on mechanism of action, pharmaceutical properties, nonclinical pharmacokinetics, clinical PK, safety, and efficacy data for the investigational drug BRC-883 (Cardanezumab).

intervention: BRC-883 (Cardanezumab), fully human IgG1 monoclonal antibody inhibiting PCSK9, 150 mg SC q4w
summary: This is Edition 1 of the Investigator Brochure for BRC-883 (Cardanezumab), a fully human IgG1 monoclonal antibody PCSK9 inhibitor developed by Biorce Therapeutics for statin-intolerant heterozygous familial hypercholesterolemia. The IB summarizes the mechanism of action, pharmaceutical properties, nonclinical and clinical pharmacokinetics, and Phase II safety and efficacy data showing -57.3% LDL-C reduction versus placebo with a well-tolerated safety profile.
